blocks.text: The Olympic flame went out in Verona last night. Norway leaves Milan-Cortina draped in gold — now all eyes shift to San Siro, where Bodo/Glimt arrive Tuesday with a 3-1 lead.
⚽ Mon 21:00 — Manchester United vs Everton, Premier League — United sit 5th, chasing Europe
Bodo/Glimt at San Siro — Norway's greatest Champions League night
Three goals up from the first leg. Even Klopp is stunned: "Hva er det de holder på med?" If Glimt hold at San Siro on Tuesday, it's the greatest night in Norwegian club football history.

blocks.label: ⚽ Champions League — also this week
items: Atlético Madrid vs Club Brugge, Tue 18:45 — all square after leg 1 ★4
AS Monaco vs PSG, Wed 21:00 — PSG lead 3-2, French derby very much alive ★4
Benfica vs Real Madrid, Wed 21:00 — Madrid's narrow lead under serious pressure ★4
